prompts.name: Soft Daylight
prompts.text: Illuminate the scene with soft natural daylight, balanced exposure, gentle shadows, and a bright, clean atmosphere that works well across many image models.

prompts.name: Golden Hour
prompts.text: Use warm golden-hour lighting with soft highlights, pleasant amber tones, and natural cinematic warmth.

prompts.name: Window Light
prompts.text: Light the scene with soft window light, realistic indoor illumination, and gentle shadow transitions.

prompts.name: Studio Portrait
prompts.text: Use clean professional studio portrait lighting with soft key light, gentle fill light, and flattering subject illumination.

prompts.name: Moonlight
prompts.text: Create a cool moonlit atmosphere with soft blue-toned illumination, readable shadows, and a calm nighttime mood.

prompts.name: Candlelight
prompts.text: Use warm candlelight to create a cozy, intimate atmosphere with soft falloff and gentle highlights.

prompts.name: Volumetric Lighting
prompts.text: Add subtle volumetric lighting and light rays to create depth and atmosphere without overwhelming the subject.

prompts.name: Overcast Day
prompts.text: Use soft overcast daylight with diffused illumination, low harsh contrast, and natural color rendering.

prompts.name: Rainy Window Light
prompts.text: Use diffused daylight through rainy windows, with a muted but cozy atmosphere and soft reflections.

prompts.name: Neon Night
prompts.text: Light the scene with colorful neon illumination, reflective highlights, and a stylish night-city mood.
